name: Port
notes: Buildable at any base with a water-adjacent tile (see game-design/02-bases-and-buildings.md). Basic navy roster — Kraken Point's Shipyard builds everything Port can plus larger/advanced ships up to Aircraft Carrier. Max level is derived as length(productionUpgradeLevels) = 2, one per troop currently in the roster (game-design/08-troop-roster.md): Gunboat, Landing Craft, in that unlock order — roster TBD beyond these two, cap grows automatically if more are added. HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
